allocated_storage.description: The amount of storage allocated for the database snapshot.

availability_zone.description: The Availability Zone where the DB snapshot is located.

db_snapshot_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB snapshot.

encrypted.description: Indicates whether the DB snapshot is encrypted.

engine.description: The database engine used for the DB snapshot.

engine_version.description: The version of the database engine used for the DB snapshot.

id.description: The unique identifier for the DB snapshot.

iops.description: The IOPS (Input/Output Operations Per Second) of the DB snapshot.

kms_key_id.description: The AWS KMS key identifier for an encrypted DB snapshot.

license_model.description: The license model information for the DB snapshot.

option_group_name.description: The option group name associated with the DB snapshot.

original_snapshot_create_time.description: The time when the original snapshot was created.

port.description: The port number on which the database listens.

snapshot_create_time.description: The time when the DB snapshot was created.

source_db_snapshot_identifier.description: The identifier of the source DB snapshot, if applicable.

source_region.description: The AWS region from which the DB snapshot was copied.

status.description: The current status of the DB snapshot.

storage_type.description: The type of storage used by the DB snapshot.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the DB snapshot.

vpc_id.description: The VPC ID associated with the DB snapshot.
